change: Re-encoded all audio from the original FLAC sources to OGG Opus, replacing the existing lower quality OGG Vorbis files with much higher fidelity versions
All-member lines now get a group-colored glow the moment a song loads, so you can spot the chorus sections at a glance
Added an Official color palette toggle that uses the official member colors alongside the original theme
Bubudle: added a subunit selector — filter clips by CYaRon, Guilty Kiss, AZALEA, Printemps, lily white, BiBi, and the Nijigasaki subunits
Sidebar search bar now sticks to the top of the menu so it stays in view while you scroll the full song list
Added Nijigasaki High School Idol Club — a brand-new group with 24 songs, album covers, per-member color themes, and subunit shortcuts (all new to the site, none of these were on the original)
Songs with approximated (unsynced) timings now show a timing approx badge so you know which mappings are still rough
Bubudle: added a Skip button to give up on a clip and reveal the answer
Full UI redesign — modernized layout, typography, and spacing across every page
Bubudle: split clip difficulty and song difficulty into separate filters so you can pick exactly the pool you want (Normal/Hard/Insane for each axis)
Menu search bar now autofocuses so you can start typing as soon as a page loads
Site rebranded to BubuDesuWho — a tribute to gacha4life's original GanbaWhoby, which inspired this rebuild
Added album cover art to every song entry in the menu
Bubudle: added volume slider, seek bar, persistent state, and Bad Timestamp / Flag Difficulty / Flag Singer buttons that save locally and export to a .txt for filing GitHub issues

Added Bubudle — a brand-new Wordle-inspired mini-game that plays a random lyric clip and asks you to guess the singer(s), with progressive hints (lyric snippet → clip difficulty → song difficulty → theme) and streak tracking
Japanese lyrics now display alongside the romaji for songs where they've been collected — useful for readers who prefer kanji/kana
Selected answer buttons now tint with each member's signature character color (Honoka orange, Chika orange, Kanan green, Ayumu pink, etc.) instead of a single generic highlight
Added an in-browser Edit mode — adjust slot timings, difficulty, and singer assignments directly on the play page, then download the corrected config as JSON to attach to a bug report
Added a per-slot Check button so you can verify one line at a time instead of waiting to submit the whole song
Added dark mode (moon toggle in the top-right of every page) with theme-aware colors across slots and lyrics
Added menu sort toggles — choose Date, A-Z, or Group grouping for the song list
Saint Aqours Snow now has its own slot template with Sarah and Leah as first-class answer buttons for the crossover songs
Added a Contributing section on the About page with direct GitHub issue links and instructions for flagging or fixing bad data
Song library grew from 110 to 251 playable songs — +55 μ's (46 → 101), +62 Aqours (57 → 119), +24 Nijigasaki (brand new group)
GanbaWhoby revived. Brand-new site launched as a tribute to gacha4life's original — preserving the game, adding a full modern UI, and massively expanding the song library
Added Fuyu ga Kureta Yokan, Trouble Busters, Silent Tonight, Saitei de Saikou no Paradiso, Sakkaku CROSSROADS, and PSYCHIC FIRE (thanks throwaway93257!)
